name: NBHD Settings Tools
description: Tenant settings tools for the assistant. Phase 1: primary-model read + switch, with the same tier gate as the consumer dashboard so the assistant cannot upgrade past its tier ceiling.

apiBaseUrl.description: Override NBHD API base URL. Defaults to NBHD_API_BASE_URL env var.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for NBHD runtime endpoint requests.
